name: Colin Jost
blurb: He served as an SNL head writer across two stints and co-hosted the 70th Primetime Emmy Awards.
bio: Colin Jost is an American comedian, writer, and actor who has been a Saturday Night Live writer since 2005 and co-anchor of Weekend Update since 2014. He served as an SNL head writer across two stints and co-hosted the 70th Primetime Emmy Awards. A multiple-time Emmy winner, he was selected as a New Face at the Just for Laughs festival in 2009.

timeline.ev: Joins Saturday Night Live as a writer
Named a New Face at the Just for Laughs festival
Becomes Weekend Update co-anchor with Michael Che
Returns as SNL head writer alongside Che
Steps down as SNL head writer

bits.yt_title: Weekend Update: Colin Jost and Michael Che Swap Jokes for Season 50 Finale
